commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/config.ts` so imported server normalization errors are caught and skipped while local server normalization errors still throw.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. On current main, an imported entry containing an unresolved `${workspaceFolder}` in a non-deferred field reaches `normalizeServerEntry`, which throws during `loadServerDefinitions`; I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical repair in config merge/normalization plus focused regression coverage.

target.title: fix: skip imported servers with unresolvable env placeholders
target.author: loveacup

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
